name: autodesk-fusion
description: High-autonomy, source-linked Codex plugin for Autodesk Fusion API development, Fusion Desktop MCP, Product Help MCP, Fusion Data MCP, APS Automation, Insider compatibility, Electronics read-only analysis, and CAD automation workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Autonomous Fusion API, MCP, APS, and CAD automation workflows.
interface.longDescription: Use Codex as a high-autonomy Autodesk Fusion developer for Python add-ins, Fusion API research, live Desktop MCP inspection and execution, APS/MFGDM cloud workflows, Automation API jobs, Fusion Insider compatibility, read-only Electronics analysis, and verification-first CAD automation.
defaultPrompt: Use Autodesk Fusion Developer autonomously: research official Fusion API sources, implement the requested change, and verify without asking for repeated confirmations.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to inspect the active Fusion design through MCP, execute changes within my requested scope, and verify the result.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to review and fix this Fusion integration for Zero Doc handling, units, event lifecycle, assembly context, preview APIs, and destructive side effects.
Use Autodesk Fusion Developer to compare public Fusion and Fusion Insider capability snapshots without exposing NDA material.
